# AUTO-GENERATED FOLDER

This folder contains compiled wiki pages generated from `atoms/`.

**DO NOT EDIT FILES IN THIS FOLDER DIRECTLY.**

To change content:

1. Edit the source atoms in `atoms/<branch>/`.
2. Run `/llm-wiki compile`.

The compiler regenerates pages here from current atoms with full provenance. Hand edits will be lost on the next compile.

Pages have a frontmatter marker (`type: ` and `date-compiled:`) that the compiler uses to confirm safety before overwriting. A wiki page lacking that marker is treated as user-authored and the compiler refuses to overwrite without `--force`.
